description: Remove all vestigial bun references from the root monorepo — config files, source comments, and stale test code

userStories.title: Remove bun references from root config files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want root config files to not reference bun so the project is cleanly Node/npm-based
acceptanceCriteria: Root .gitguardian.yaml no longer contains 'bun.lock' — either remove the entry or the entire file if it only had that one entry
userStories.notes:
Two files to edit:

1. .gitignore line 6: remove the 'bun.lockb' line entirely.

2. .gitguardian.yaml: the entire file content is just `paths_ignore:\n  - 'bun.lock'`. Remove the bun.lock entry from paths_ignore. If the file becomes empty (just `paths_ignore:` with no entries), delete the file entirely.

userStories.title: Update stale bun references in source comments
userStories.description: As a developer, I want source code comments to accurately describe current behavior without referencing the old bun runtime
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/dev.ts line 12 no longer mentions 'bun --hot' — reword to describe the dev proxy's hot reload mechanism
platform/mcp-server/src/config.test.ts line 260 no longer mentions 'bun process' — update to reference vitest
platform/mcp-server/src/http-routes.test.ts line 832 no longer uses the term 'bunServer' — rename to something like 'mockServer' or 'upgradingServer'
userStories.notes:
Three comments to update:

1. scripts/dev.ts line 12: currently says 'dist/ file changes, replacing bun --hot.' — reword to something like 'dist/ file changes via process restart.' since the dev proxy replaces the old bun --hot approach with process forking.

2. platform/mcp-server/src/config.test.ts line 260: currently says 'concurrently in the same bun process may have modified it.' — change 'bun process' to 'vitest process' or simply 'test process'.

3. platform/mcp-server/src/http-routes.test.ts line 832: the JSDoc comment says '/** Mock bunServer that reports successful upgrades */' — change to '/** Mock server that reports successful upgrades */'. The variable name on line 833 is 'upgradingServer' which is already fine.

userStories.title: Remove stale bun path deduplication test from resolver
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests to reflect actual production code behavior without testing removed bun functionality
acceptanceCriteria: The test 'deduplicates plugins found in overlapping npm and bun paths' in platform/mcp-server/src/resolver.test.ts is removed or rewritten to not reference bun
No remaining references to 'bun' exist in resolver.test.ts
userStories.notes:
platform/mcp-server/src/resolver.test.ts lines 513-527: This test ('deduplicates plugins found in overlapping npm and bun paths') tests bun path discovery that no longer exists in production code (resolver.ts has no bun references). The test mocks `bun pm` commands on line 520.

The deduplication behavior is still valuable to test but should use realistic scenarios. Options:
- Rewrite the test to test deduplication across multiple npm prefix paths (e.g., global npm root returning the same directory twice, or overlapping npm paths).
- If the deduplication logic only ever triggers with npm paths in practice, rename and adjust the test to reflect that. The mock on line 520 handles `bun pm` — replace it with another npm path variant or remove it and simplify the test.

The key goal: the test should verify deduplication works, but without referencing bun. Check what `discoverGlobalNpmPlugins` actually does in resolver.ts to understand what scenarios produce overlapping paths with npm only.
